endpoints.name: List Order Accounting
endpoints.description: Retrieves accounting activity during the queried timespan.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FULFILLMENT_API_KEY}} with your FULFILLMENT API KEY.

endpoints.name: List of Item Inventories
endpoints.description: Retrieve inventory for one or more items. This API requires elevated permissions, please speak to your success manager.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FULFILLMENT_API_KEY}} with your FULFILLMENT API KEY.

endpoints.name: List of Orders
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FULFILLMENT_API_KEY}} with your FULFILLMENT API KEY.

endpoints.name: New Order
endpoints.description:
Error Notes:
* When `409 Conflict` is a 'Duplicate Order' the `context` will include the FDC `id`, see samples.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FULFILLMENT_API_KEY}} with your FULFILLMENT API KEY.

endpoints.name: Order Details
endpoints.description: For the fastest results use the FDC provided `id` however you can use your `merchantOrderId` as the `id`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FULFILLMENT_API_KEY}} with your FULFILLMENT API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Cancel an Order
endpoints.description: Request an order is canceled to prevent shipment.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FULFILLMENT_API_KEY}} with your FULFILLMENT API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Ship an Order
endpoints.description: Note, this API is used to update orders and is reserved for our shipping partners.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FULFILLMENT_API_KEY}} with your FULFILLMENT API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Update Order Status
endpoints.description: Note, this API is used to update orders and is reserved for our shipping partners.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FULFILLMENT_API_KEY}} with your FULFILLMENT API KEY. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: List Returns
endpoints.description: Retrieves summary return activity during the queried timespan. Although return knowledge can be learned from `GET /orders/{id}` it can take an unknown amount of time for an order that is refused or undeliverable to return to an FDC facility. Instead we recommend regularly querying this API.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FULFILLMENT_API_KEY}} with your FULFILLMENT API KEY.

endpoints.name: Inform us of an RMA
endpoints.description: Inform FDC of an expected return.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FULFILLMENT_API_KEY}} with your FULFILLMENT API KEY.

endpoints.name: Tracking
endpoints.description: Get uniformed tracking events for any package, this response is carrier independent. Please note, an API Key is required for throttling purposes, please contact your success manager for details.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FULFILLMENT_API_KEY}} with your FULFILLMENT API KEY.

endpoints.name: About Me
endpoints.description: Returns the user profile of the access token's owner. This could be useful if managing multiple accounts or confirming validity of a token.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FULFILLMENT_API_KEY}} with your FULFILLMENT API KEY.
